notes: Power-off stability fix: the slide-to-power-off was failing intermittently (device looked like it shut down, then woke back up). Cause: deep sleep was starting while the BOOT button was still bouncing or held, and the EXT1 wake source triggered instantly. Fix: wait for 400 ms of continuous HIGH on the button line before sleeping, show a RELEASE BUTTON prompt during the wait, and abort the power-off if the button can't be released within 10 s instead of sleeping into a guaranteed-wake cycle.
